---
title: pelican cache introspect list
---

## pelican cache introspect list

List cached objects

### Synopsis

List objects currently in the cache, optionally filtered by a glob pattern.

The pattern is matched against the source URL of each cached object.
Standard glob syntax is supported: * matches any sequence of non-/
characters, ** matches everything including slashes, and ? matches
a single character.

If no pattern is given, all objects are listed.

Warning: For large caches, this may return many results. Use --limit
to restrict the number of entries returned.

Examples:
  pelican cache introspect list
  pelican cache introspect list '/chtc/staging/**'
  pelican cache introspect list '*.bin'
  pelican cache introspect list --limit=50 'pelican://origin.example.com/data/*'

```
pelican cache introspect list [pattern] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help        help for list
      --limit int   Maximum number of objects to list (default 100)
  -w, --wide        Never truncate URLs or ETags in table output
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --cache-dir string    Override cache directory (default: from config)
      --config string       config file (default is $HOME/.config/pelican/pelican.yaml)
  -d, --debug               Enable debug log messages
  -f, --federation string   Pelican federation to utilize
      --json                Output in JSON format
  -L, --log string          Specified log output file
      --offline             Force offline mode (direct database access). By default, if the cache is running, queries go to the live service.
  -t, --token string        Path to admin token file (online mode only; auto-generated if not provided)
      --version             Print the version and exit
```
